steps: Remove the lid of sample collector. Direct the sample provider to expel saliva into the collector until 0.5 mL has been collected. Replace lid. Teeth brushing, mouthwash, drinks, food, and nasal sprays should be avoided for half an hour before sample collection.
Immediately proceed with RNA extraction. Do not store sample.
Prepare 500 µL of Buffer AVL Qiagen Catalog #19073
Add 100 µL of heat-treated sample to buffer. Mix for 00:00:15
Collect cellular debris. Add 100 µL of Ethanol, Absolute, Molecular Biology Grade Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #BP2818500 Mix for 00:00:30
Prepare 8 µL multiplex primer-probe-water mix in advance, containing the following: %s %s
Centrifuge at 500 x g for 00:02:00 Then remove buffer.
Add 60 µL of Buffer AVE Qiagen Catalog #1020953
Prepare 140 µL of master mix in advance, using UltraPlex 1-Step ToughMix (4X) Quantabio Catalog #95166-01K with the following quantities: %s %s
Add 60 µL of previously purified RNA sample to 140 µL of master mix. Load onto qPCR device.
Proceed with thermocycling, under the following conditions: %s %s
